events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess confined space pre-entry 4-gas readings: O2 20.7 %VOL, LEL 2%, H2S 4 ppm, CO 4 ppm. Determine acceptable entry limits. OSHA 1910.146: permit-required confined space atmospheric testing acceptable entry conditions: oxygen content between 19.5% and 23.5%; flammable gas/vapor/mist below 10% LEL (unless hot work then 10%? For entry generally <10% LEL); toxic substances below PEL or other published exposure levels. H2S permissible exposure limit ceiling 10 ppm (general industry 10 ppm ceiling, construction 10 ppm TWA? Actually OSHA PEL 10 ppm ceiling). CO PEL 50 ppm TWA, 200 ppm ceiling? 35 ppm TWA? Let's recall: OSHA PEL for carbon monoxide is 50 ppm TWA, with a ceiling of 200 ppm (5-min max in any 3-hour period). NIOSH REL 35 ppm TWA, 200 ppm ceiling. For confined space entry, acceptable if below OSHA PEL. Readings all within. O2 20.7 within 19.5-23.5. LEL 2% <10%. H2S 4 ppm <10 ppm ceiling. CO 4 ppm <50 ppm. So pass. Risk low. Work_stage planned. percent_complete maybe 0? The task says stage planned (scoped but not yet started). percent_complete numeric estimate overall progress. Pre-entry test is part of permit; work not started, so 0. value maybe 0? The task asks use value for numeric reading or computed quantity when task asks for one. It asks read all four channels and determine. Could set value to 0 or maybe not used. But schema requires value number. Use 0. component_conditions empty. findings empty. actions empty. rationale brief. references OSHA 1910.146. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.
